'''Dononter Minor''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="Endor" /> located in the [[Dononter Minor system/Legends|Dononter Minor system]], a part of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Dononter sector/Legends|Dononter sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Dononter Minor had a [[Atmosphere/Legends|Type I]] breathable atmosphere, and it was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Plant/Legends|plant]] known as the [[Widowmaker (plant)|widowmaker]], which could be used as a weapon.<ref name="Endor" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dononter Minor was mentioned in the article "[[Endor and the Moddell Sector]]," which was authored by [[Craig Robert Carey]], [[Daniel Wallace]], and [[Jason Fry]], and was published in [[Star Wars Gamer 9|''Star Wars Gamer'' 9]]<ref name="Endor" /> on [[February 22]], [[2002]].<ref name="GamerDate">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/other/rpg/news20020222.html|text=Starfighters Soar in Gamer #9}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Dononter Minor [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the world Dononter Minor, in grid square I-16.<ref name="TEA" />
